data.title: Mogotes Metals Secures Rio Tinto-Backed Copper Cliff Option in Montana
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mogotes Metals Inc. ( (TSE:MOG) ) just unveiled an update.

Mogotes Metals Inc. has signed an option-to-joint-venture agreement with Rio Tinto subsidiary Kennecott Exploration Company over the Copper Cliff gold-copper porphyry project in Montana, securing access to a large, underexplored land package in a historic mining district. The project benefits from an existing Rio Tinto drill database that includes long, mineralized intercepts and an exploration target defined over a vertical extent of about 1,000 metres and a projected surface footprint of roughly 450 by 300 metres.

Under the deal, Mogotes can earn up to a 60% interest in Copper Cliff by funding up to US$56 million in staged exploration expenditures, with at least 70% of early spending directed to drilling, and an initial US$4 million commitment in the first year. The company highlights that Copper Cliff’s northern-hemisphere field season is countercyclical to its Filo Sur project, positioning Mogotes for continuous, year-round exploration and news flow while leveraging Rio Tinto’s prior discovery work to potentially expand the known porphyry mineralization and enhance its portfolio of tier-one copper-gold targets.

More about Mogotes Metals Inc.

Mogotes Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on large-scale gold-copper porphyry systems, with projects including the Filo Sur project and the newly optioned Copper Cliff project in Montana, U.S.A. The company targets tier-one deposits and seeks to maintain year-round exploration activity by operating projects in complementary seasonal windows.

Average Trading Volume: 569,789

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$165.8M

data.title: Indel B Calls 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting To Renew Governance And Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Indel B S.p.A. ( (IT:INDB) ) has provided an update.

Indel B S.p.A. has convened its ordinary shareholders’ meeting for 25 May 2026, to be held exclusively via telecommunication with participation only through an appointed representative. Shareholders of record as of 14 May 2026 must provide voting instructions by proxy to Computershare S.p.A. within the specified deadlines to exercise their voting rights.

The agenda includes approval of the 2025 separate and consolidated financial statements, allocation of profit, a binding vote on the remuneration policy and an advisory vote on compensation paid. Shareholders will also vote on renewing the boards of directors and statutory auditors, setting related remuneration, and authorising a new treasury share purchase and disposal plan to replace the existing authorisation for the unused portion.

More about Indel B S.p.A.

Indel B S.p.A. operates in the refrigeration and air-conditioning sector, producing refrigeration systems and related equipment for mobile and stationary applications. The company focuses on solutions for automotive, leisure, hospitality and industrial markets, and is listed with a share capital of 5,842,000 ordinary shares, including a significant portion held as treasury shares.

Average Trading Volume: 863

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €108.8M

data.description:

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6990) ) has issued an announcement.

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical has subscribed to structured deposit wealth management products totaling RMB390 million with China Zheshang Bank and RMB300 million with Bank of China. These products are principal-guaranteed with floating returns, indicating the company is seeking to enhance returns on idle funds while preserving capital.

The combined RMB690 million in structured deposits crosses the disclosure threshold under Hong Kong listing rules, classifying each bank subscription as a discloseable transaction subject to reporting and announcement requirements. The move underscores the firm’s active treasury management and may modestly improve interest income without diverting resources from its core biopharmaceutical operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6990) stock is a Buy with a HK$526.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:6990 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a Hong Kong-listed biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative drugs in China. The company operates in the healthcare and life sciences sector, deploying surplus cash into low-risk financial instruments while pursuing its core pharmaceutical research and commercial activities.

data.title: Kazia Therapeutics Names Epigenetics Pioneer Sudha Rao as Chief Scientific Officer to Drive Oncology Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kazia Therapeutics ( (KZIA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 10, 2026, Kazia Therapeutics entered into an employment agreement with translational epigenetics expert Dr. Sudha Rao to become its Chief Scientific Officer, effective April 13, 2026, on a part-time basis. The package includes an annual salary of AUD$325,000, a performance bonus opportunity, and options over 250,000 ADSs, while allowing her to maintain her academic and research role at QIMR Berghofer Medical Research Institute.

Announced publicly in a 15 April 2026 filing and press release, the appointment brings the scientific originator of paxalisib’s epigenetic framework and architect of Kazia’s NDL2 and MSETC platforms directly into the executive team. Rao will lead all R&D, biomarker strategy, collaborations, and platform development, bolstering Kazia’s position in next-generation oncology and precision epigenetic therapeutics as it advances its integrated, multi-program cancer pipeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (KZIA) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kazia Therapeutics stock, see the KZIA Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KZIA is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, large ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn with negative equity). Technicals are a notable offset with strong momentum above major moving averages, but overbought signals add near-term risk; valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on KZIA stock, click here.

More about Kazia Therapeutics

Kazia Therapeutics Limited is an oncology-focused drug development company based in Sydney, Australia, and listed on NASDAQ under the ticker KZIA. Its lead asset is paxalisib, a brain-penetrant PI3K/Akt/mTOR inhibitor being advanced across multiple cancer indications, alongside EVT801, a VEGFR3 inhibitor, and preclinical programs such as NDL2, a nuclear PD-L1 degrader, and MSETC, a SETDB1-targeted epigenetic platform.

The latest announcement is out from Yida China Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:3639) ).

Yida China Holdings Ltd. reported unaudited contracted sales of about RMB19 million in March 2026, with 1,143 square meters of gross floor area sold at an average selling price of roughly RMB16,700 per square meter. For the first quarter ended 31 March 2026, contracted sales totaled approximately RMB37 million on 2,547 square meters sold, at an average price of about RMB14,500 per square meter.

The company stressed that these operating figures are preliminary, unaudited, and may differ from those in forthcoming financial statements, urging investors not to place undue reliance on the data. data.title: Quantum Blockchain Wins Bondholder Backing for Extended, Amended 2013 Debt
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Quantum Blockchain Technologies PLC ( (GB:QBT) ) has provided an update.

Quantum Blockchain Technologies has secured bondholder approval to amend the terms of its zero-coupon bond first issued in 2013, following a meeting in which 78% of outstanding bondholders voted. The changes extend the bond’s maturity to 15 December 2028, reduce the conversion price to 2 pence per new ordinary share, and remove bondholders’ right to redeem in the event of a de-listing.

The revised bond structure gives the company more time to execute its blockchain R&D strategy while potentially making conversion into equity more attractive for investors. Removing the de‑listing redemption option also simplifies the capital structure and could reduce refinancing risk, with implications for both bondholders’ exit options and the company’s flexibility in managing its market listing.

Spark’s Take on QBT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, QBT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very weak financial performance (minimal revenue, persistent losses, negative equity, and multi-year cash burn). Technicals add further pressure with the stock trading below key moving averages and negative MACD. Valuation provides limited support because the negative P/E reflects ongoing unprofitability and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on QBT stock, click here.

More about Quantum Blockchain Technologies PLC

Quantum Blockchain Technologies is a London-listed research and development and investment company focused on blockchain technologies, including cryptocurrency mining and advanced blockchain applications. Its core R&D programme aims to develop technology-driven Bitcoin mining tools and techniques that it believes can significantly outperform current market practices.

Average Trading Volume: 5,689,183

data.title: Purebase delays quarterly filing but trims losses
data.description:
PureBase ( (PUBC) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Purebase Corporation has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will be late in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the quarter ended February 28, 2026. The delayed filing relates specifically to the company’s Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q (Quarter Report), which was originally due on April 14, 2026.

The company cites the need for additional time to finalize certain disclosures as the reason for missing the deadline. Management indicates that filing on time would have required unreasonable effort or expense, suggesting internal reporting and disclosure preparation are still being completed.

Purebase states that it expects to file the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) within the standard SEC grace period. For a late quarterly filing under this rule, that means the company intends to submit the report within five calendar days of the original due date.

The company is signaling that a notable shift in its financial results is expected for the quarter. It estimates that net loss will shrink by about $105,000, with operating expenses falling roughly $187,000, driven by lower wages and professional fees, while other expenses are projected to rise around $82,000 due mainly to higher interest from debt discount expense.

These figures are preliminary estimates and should be treated as forward-looking statements that may change once the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) is formally filed. Investors should be aware that the final numbers could differ as the company completes its review and finalizes all required disclosures.

Purebase affirms that it has filed all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months, which may reassure investors about its general compliance record. The notification was signed on April 15, 2026, by Stephen Gillings on behalf of the company, underscoring ongoing efforts to complete the quarter’s reporting in line with SEC rules.

More about PureBase

Average Trading Volume: 61,707

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.84M

data.title: Los Andes Copper Retires US$5 Million Convertible Debenture Through Share Issuance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Los Andes Copper ( (TSE:LA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Los Andes Copper has extinguished all remaining obligations under its US$5 million eight percent convertible debenture issued in 2021 to Queen’s Road Capital Investment by issuing 80,071 common shares at a deemed price of C$10.82 to settle the last portion of principal and accrued interest. The settlement, which includes interest shares subject to a standard Canadian securities hold period, leaves the debenture fully converted into equity with all accrued interest paid, simplifying the company’s capital structure as it continues to progress the large-scale Vizcachitas copper project in Chile.

Spark’s Take on LA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn) and limited valuation support due to negative earnings. Technicals are also soft in the near term (below key short-term averages with negative MACD), partially offset by a stronger longer-term trend and a relatively solid balance sheet with moderate leverage.

To see Spark’s full report on LA stock, click here.

More about Los Andes Copper

Los Andes Copper Ltd. is an exploration and development company that holds a 100% interest in the Vizcachitas copper-molybdenum porphyry project in Chile, located 150 kilometers north of Santiago in a well-serviced infrastructure corridor along the country’s main copper belt. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker LA, the company is focused on advancing Vizcachitas, one of the largest undeveloped copper deposits in the Americas not controlled by major mining groups, toward production as a potential next major Chilean copper mine.

data.title: Smart Capital-Backed Merger into CrowdFundMe Clears Golden Power Hurdle
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ) has issued an announcement.

Smart Capital’s subsidiary Smart4Tech and equity crowdfunding specialist WeAreStarting have cleared a key regulatory hurdle to be merged into CrowdFundMe, the listed Italian crowdinvesting platform. The Presidency of the Council of Ministers determined that the merger transaction does not fall under Italy’s Golden Power rules, satisfying the related condition precedent in the merger agreement.

With the Golden Power condition fulfilled, the path is now open for completion of the integration, which will combine Smart4Tech’s and WeAreStarting’s capabilities within CrowdFundMe’s broader alternative finance ecosystem. The move is set to reinforce CrowdFundMe’s positioning in Italy’s crowdfunding and minibond markets and supports Smart Capital’s strategy of building long-term holdings in niche, high-growth financial services platforms.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SMCAP) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smart Capital S.P.A. stock, see the IT:SMCAP Stock Forecast page.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is an Italian industrial holding company with a permanent capital structure that specializes in private equity and private investments in public equity, focusing on small and medium-sized Italian enterprises at various listing stages in Italy and abroad. CrowdFundMe S.p.A., based in Milan, operates one of Italy’s main crowdinvesting platforms across equity, real estate and corporate debt, targeting both retail and institutional investors seeking alternative finance opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 12,258

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
